glossaryEntries.definition: Fire Damage is increased by attacker Intelligence and mitigated by target Initiative.
Physical Damage is increased by attacker Strength and mitigated by target Instinct.

abilities.name: Cleansing Wrath
abilities.rawDescription: Each Round: up to three independent 20% Cleanse attempts. Rounds 3, 6, 9: Fire Damage to one enemy in the same lane (Damage Rate: +190%).

abilities.name: Champion's Brilliance
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in the Vanguard, increase self Strength, Intelligence, and Instinct by +15. Reduce Damage Received of the Right Flank ally by 8%.

abilities.name: Clever Maneuver
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: Increase Intelligence and Initiative of the ally with highest Intelligence until end of combat.

abilities.name: Wind's Favor
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: Increase Initiative of three Allies in any lane until end of combat, enhanced by Initiative.

notes: Exact 3 Allies targeting is normalized to all three friendly dragons and includes the caster.

abilities.name: Infectious Wrath
abilities.rawDescription: Augments Cleansing Wrath with Infectious Wrath stacks and Panic-conditional Physical Damage.

conditionalMultipliers.description: Damage is doubled when target has Panic.

abilities.name: Cunning Ferocity
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: Increase Intelligence and Fire Damage Dealt of two Allies within adjacency until end of combat.

abilities.name: Loyal Bond
abilities.rawDescription: Each Round: grant Advantage above 50% Troop Capacity or Resistance below 50% Troop Capacity to 2 other Allies.

notes: Resistance reduces Damage Received. Exact stacking and refresh behavior remain unresolved.

unresolvedQuestions: Resistance stacking, refresh, and multiple-source combination.
